reviews.take: Overplayed? Maybe. But there's a reason every person with a guitar learns this one

notes.label: the bridge
notes.note: Liam's delivery on this bridge is what makes the whole song
notes.lyric: I said maybe, you're gonna be the one that saves me

notes.label: final chorus

reviews.trackAlbum: A Night At The Opera (2011 Remaster)
reviews.take: A six-minute operatic rock epic that defies all conventions and somehow works perfectly

notes.label: the piano break
notes.note: Freddie's piano intro builds such incredible tension before exploding into the chorus
notes.lyric: Mama, just killed a man

notes.label: operatic section
notes.note: This shouldn't work but it's absolute genius - the vocal harmonies are insane
notes.lyric: Galileo, Galileo, Galileo Figaro

notes.label: the headbanging moment
notes.note: Brian May's guitar solo here is one of the greatest rock moments ever recorded
notes.lyric: So you think you can stone me and spit in my eye?

reviews.take: That bassline is one of the most iconic grooves ever laid down

notes.label: the hook
notes.note: The way MJ's voice locks in with the bassline here is pure perfection
notes.lyric: Billie Jean is not my lover

notes.label: drum fill
notes.note: This snare fill into the final chorus gives me chills every time

notes.label: the fadeout
notes.note: Never wants to end - could listen to this groove loop forever

reviews.take: Raw teenage angst distilled into three and a half minutes of pure grunge perfection

notes.label: the drop
notes.note: When the full band kicks in after the quiet intro - iconic moment in rock history
notes.lyric: Load up on guns, bring your friends

notes.label: chorus explosion
notes.note: Kurt's raspy scream here captures everything that made grunge revolutionary
notes.lyric: With the lights out, it's less dangerous

notes.label: guitar solo
notes.note: Deliberately sloppy and perfect - anti-virtuoso at its finest

reviews.take: Stevie Nicks at her ethereal best - the production on this is timeless

notes.label: vocals enter
notes.note: Stevie's voice floating over that drum groove is pure magic
notes.lyric: Now here you go again, you say you want your freedom

notes.label: the hook
notes.note: The way 'thunder only happens when it's raining' sits on the beat is genius
notes.lyric: Thunder only happens when it's raining

notes.label: fadeout groove
notes.note: Could listen to this drum/bass pocket forever - Mick and John are locked in

reviews.take: That clavinet riff is burned into my brain forever - funk perfection

notes.label: opening riff
notes.note: One of the most recognizable instrumental openings in music history

notes.label: horn stabs
notes.note: These horn hits are so crisp and punchy - the arrangement is perfect
notes.lyric: Superstition ain't the way

notes.label: drum break
notes.note: The drum fill here is so satisfying - that Stevie Wonder pocket

reviews.take: Was a 5/5 before iceman was a niceman now im uncle

albumReviews.take:
top 3 and it aint 2 or 3. WE are all having an AP summer #asianpaper #AP
i actually have too much to say about this but if i had to be concise... genre bending life changing stuff
good lordy for a debut album they came out guns blazing how do you even begin to top this its actually too good
part of me feels so validated bc theres so many references to things i grew up with and that was the INTENTION!!!! so heartfelt a real love letter to the british south asian experience. i love this album with all my heart
top 3 and it aint 2 or 3. WE are all having an AP summer #asianpaper #AP

albumReviews.take:
i do love my computer!!! i get her so bad
i do love my computer!!! i get her so bad
truly just so heartfelt and intentional with every track and every sound. start to finish feels like a personal set she put on for you, in her own bedroom. growing up online is a unique experience people born in the last 20 or so years have, and thats insane to think about. she opens that narrative beautifully, navigates the good and bad, all the while making it so replayable and danceable and cohesive. the influence from other artists she grew up listening to is so clear, and they feel like little easter eggs when you pick up on it ('oh this kinda sounds like x song by y!') . my heart is full nina, this was an amazing experience.  please never stop making music <3
